name: promptonality
description: Portable personality packs and thin adapters that add voice, structure, and cognitive framing to reusable workflows

interface.shortDescription: Interchangeable personality lenses for reusable workflows
interface.longDescription: Provides a personality-pack contract, neutral workflow cores, session bootstraps, extraction skills, and thin adapters that add voice, structure, and reasoning style without cloning the entire workflow.
defaultPrompt: Review this project architecture like Bjarne Stroustrup.
Review this project architecture like Yoda.
